course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Exploring Biomes — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Exploring Biomes" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 3

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Exploring Biomes — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
I embarked on an epic **journey** to explore as many biomes as possible. My goal was to find a cherry grove, a rare pink biome with beautiful **blossoming** trees.

I traveled through forests, plains, swamps, and taigas. Each biome had **unique** features: the swamp had witch huts, the taiga had foxes, and the plains had **horses** I could tame.

The most **spectacular** biome I found was a mushroom island surrounded by ocean. No hostile mobs spawn there naturally, making it the safest place in the entire **world**.

After hours of exploring, I finally spotted the pink trees of a cherry grove on a distant **hilltop**. The petals floated down like snow and the whole area looked absolutely **magical**.

I collected cherry saplings to plant back at my base and made the long **return** trip home. Exploring different biomes reminds me why Minecraft never gets **boring**.
lesson.transcript_zh:
我踏上了一场史诗般的旅程来探索尽可能多的生态群系。我的目标是找到樱花林，一个有美丽开花树木的稀有粉色生态群系。

我穿越了森林、平原、沼泽和针叶林。每个生态群系都有独特的特征：沼泽有女巫小屋，针叶林有狐狸，平原有可以驯服的马。

我找到的最壮观的生态群系是一个被海洋环绕的蘑菇岛。那里不会自然生成敌对生物，使它成为整个世界最安全的地方。

探索了数小时后，我终于在远处的山顶看到了樱花林的粉色树木。花瓣像雪一样飘落，整个区域看起来绝对神奇。

我收集了樱花树苗带回基地种植并踏上了漫长的回家路。探索不同的生态群系让我想起为什么Minecraft永远不会无聊。

question.prompt: What biome has no hostile mob spawns?
